payload.author: claude
payload.body: EPIC DONE. All 22 audit findings fixed and regression-tested. Full suite 322/322, 0 skipped, x3 consecutive runs vs real Postgres. Residual hardening noted for later (not vulnerabilities): CSP still allows unsafe-inline for the SPA; SCOPE_PG_APP_ROLE must be set in prod for RLS to bind; incremental replay (SCP-143) still pending.
